headline: Can Futu Absorb Its CSRC Penalty Without Losing Momentum?
summary: Futu's core metrics remain firm in Q1, but a RMB1.85 billion regulatory penalty hits profit and raises questions about growth quality.

headline: Interactive Brokers Group (IBKR) Surged on Account Growth and Improved Trading Volume
summary: TimesSquare Capital Management, an equity investment management company, released its “U.S. Mid Cap Growth Strategy” first-quarter 2026 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The Strategy fell 7.72% (net) in the quarter compared to -6.35% for the Russell Midcap Growth Index. In the first quarter, markets navigated geopolitical tensions and economic resilience […]

headline: Interactive Brokers Expands Access to Korean Equities with Launch of Nextrade ATS
summary: GREENWICH, Conn., June 30, 2026--Interactive Brokers (Nasdaq: IBKR) announced the launch of select Korean equities through Nextrade.

headline: Interactive Brokers Group to Host Second Quarter Earnings Conference Call
summary: GREENWICH, Conn., June 30, 2026--Interactive Brokers Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: IBKR) plans to announce its second quarter financial results on Tuesday, July 21, 2026, in a release that will be issued at approximately 4:00 pm (ET). The press release will also be available on the company's website, www.interactivebrokers.com/ir.
